13: // A CredentialStore contains credential libraries. It is owned by a project.
14: type CredentialStore struct {
15: 	*store.CredentialStore
16: 	tableName string `gorm:"-"`
17:

26: // NewCredentialStore creates a new in memory CredentialStore for a Vault
27: // server at vaultAddress assigned to projectId. Name, description, CA cert,
28: // client cert, namespace, TLS server name, worker filter, and TLS skip verify are the
29: // only valid options. All other options are ignored.
30: func NewCredentialStore(projectId string, vaultAddress string, token TokenSecret, opt ...Option) (*CredentialStore, error) {
31: 	opts := getOpts(opt...)
32: 	cs := &CredentialStore{
33: 		inputToken: token,
34: 		clientCert: opts.withClientCert,
35: 		CredentialStore: &store.CredentialStore{
36: 			ProjectId:     projectId,
37: 			Name:          opts.withName,
38: 			Description:   opts.withDescription,
39: 			VaultAddress:  vaultAddress,
40: 			CaCert:        opts.withCACert,
41: 			Namespace:     opts.withNamespace,
42: 			TlsServerName: opts.withTlsServerName,
43: 			TlsSkipVerify: opts.withTlsSkipVerify,
44: 			WorkerFilter:  opts.withWorkerFilter,
45: 		},
46: 	}
47: 	return cs, nil
48: }
49: 
50: func allocCredentialStore() *CredentialStore {
51: 	return &CredentialStore{
52: 		CredentialStore: &store.CredentialStore{},
53: 	}
54: }
55: 
56: func (cs *CredentialStore) clone() *CredentialStore {
57: 	tokenCopy := make(TokenSecret, len(cs.inputToken))
58: 	copy(tokenCopy, cs.inputToken)
59: 	var clientCertCopy *ClientCertificate
60: 	if cs.clientCert != nil {
61: 		clientCertCopy = cs.clientCert.clone()
62: 	}
63: 	cp := proto.Clone(cs.CredentialStore)
64: 	return &CredentialStore{
65: 		inputToken:      tokenCopy,
66: 		clientCert:      clientCertCopy,
67: 		CredentialStore: cp.(*store.CredentialStore),
68: 	}
69: }
70: 
71: // applyUpdate returns a new CredentialStore with the new values applied to
72: // this based on the passed in fieldMaskPaths.
73: func (cs *CredentialStore) applyUpdate(new *CredentialStore, fieldMaskPaths []string) *CredentialStore {
74: 	cp := cs.clone()
75: 	for _, f := range fieldMaskPaths {
76: 		switch {
77: 		case strings.EqualFold(nameField, f):
78: 			cp.Name = new.Name
79: 		case strings.EqualFold(descriptionField, f):
80: 			cp.Description = new.Description
81: 		case strings.EqualFold(certificateField, f):
82: 			if new.clientCert == nil {
83: 				cp.clientCert = nil
84: 				continue
85: 			}
86: 			if cp.clientCert == nil {
87: 				cp.clientCert = allocClientCertificate()
88: 			}
89: 			cp.clientCert.Certificate = new.clientCert.GetCertificate()
90: 			cp.clientCert.StoreId = cs.GetPublicId()
91: 		case strings.EqualFold(certificateKeyField, f):
92: 			if new.clientCert == nil {
93: 				cp.clientCert = nil
94: 				continue
95: 			}
96: 			if cp.clientCert == nil {
97: 				cp.clientCert = allocClientCertificate()
98: 			}
99: 			cp.clientCert.CertificateKey = new.clientCert.GetCertificateKey()
100: 			cp.clientCert.StoreId = cs.GetPublicId()
101: 		case strings.EqualFold(vaultAddressField, f):
102: 			cp.VaultAddress = new.VaultAddress
103: 		case strings.EqualFold(namespaceField, f):
104: 			cp.Namespace = new.Namespace
105: 		case strings.EqualFold(caCertField, f):
106: 			cp.CaCert = new.CaCert
107: 		case strings.EqualFold(tlsServerNameField, f):
108: 			cp.TlsServerName = new.TlsServerName
109: 		case strings.EqualFold(tlsSkipVerifyField, f):
110: 			cp.TlsSkipVerify = new.TlsSkipVerify
111: 		case strings.EqualFold(tokenField, f):
112: 			cp.inputToken = new.inputToken
113: 		case strings.EqualFold(workerFilterField, f):
114: 			cp.WorkerFilter = new.WorkerFilter
115: 		}
116: 	}
117: 	return cp
118: }

121: func (cs *CredentialStore) TableName() string {
122: 	if cs.tableName != "" {

116: // ListCredentialStores implements the interface pbs.CredentialStoreServiceServer
117: func (s Service) ListCredentialStores(ctx context.Context, req *pbs.ListCredentialStoresRequest) (*pbs.ListCredentialStoresResponse, error) {
118: 	if err := validateListRequest(req); err != nil {
119: 		return nil, err
120: 	}
121: 	authResults := s.authResult(ctx, req.GetScopeId(), action.List)
122: 	if authResults.Error != nil {
123: 		// If it's forbidden, and it's a recursive request, and they're
124: 		// successfully authenticated but just not authorized, keep going as we
125: 		// may have authorization on downstream scopes. Or, if they've not
126: 		// authenticated, still process in case u_anon has permissions.
127: 		if (authResults.Error == handlers.ForbiddenError() || authResults.Error == handlers.UnauthenticatedError()) &&
128: 			req.GetRecursive() &&
129: 			authResults.AuthenticationFinished {
130: 		} else {
131: 			return nil, authResults.Error
132: 		}
133: 	}
134: 
135: 	scopeIds, scopeInfoMap, err := scopeids.GetListingScopeIds(
136: 		ctx, s.iamRepoFn, authResults, req.GetScopeId(), resource.CredentialStore, req.GetRecursive())
137: 	if err != nil {
138: 		return nil, err
139: 	}
140: 	// If no scopes match, return an empty response
141: 	if len(scopeIds) == 0 {
142: 		return &pbs.ListCredentialStoresResponse{}, nil
143: 	}
144: 
145: 	csl, err := s.listFromRepo(ctx, scopeIds)
146: 	if err != nil {
147: 		return nil, err
148: 	}
149: 	if len(csl) == 0 {
150: 		return &pbs.ListCredentialStoresResponse{}, nil
151: 	}
152: 
153: 	filter, err := handlers.NewFilter(req.GetFilter())
154: 	if err != nil {
155: 		return nil, err
156: 	}
157: 	finalItems := make([]*pb.CredentialStore, 0, len(csl))
158: 	res := perms.Resource{
159: 		Type: resource.CredentialStore,
160: 	}
161: 	for _, item := range csl {
162: 		res.Id = item.GetPublicId()
163: 		res.ScopeId = item.GetProjectId()
164: 		authorizedActions := authResults.FetchActionSetForId(ctx, item.GetPublicId(), IdActions, auth.WithResource(&res)).Strings()
165: 		if len(authorizedActions) == 0 {
166: 			continue
167: 		}
168: 
169: 		outputFields := authResults.FetchOutputFields(res, action.List).SelfOrDefaults(authResults.UserId)
170: 		outputOpts := make([]handlers.Option, 0, 3)
171: 		outputOpts = append(outputOpts, handlers.WithOutputFields(&outputFields))
172: 		if outputFields.Has(globals.ScopeField) {
173: 			outputOpts = append(outputOpts, handlers.WithScope(scopeInfoMap[item.GetProjectId()]))
174: 		}
175: 		if outputFields.Has(globals.AuthorizedActionsField) {
176: 			outputOpts = append(outputOpts, handlers.WithAuthorizedActions(authorizedActions))
177: 		}
178: 		if outputFields.Has(globals.AuthorizedCollectionActionsField) {
179: 			collectionActions, err := calculateAuthorizedCollectionActions(ctx, authResults, item.GetPublicId())
180: 			if err != nil {
181: 				return nil, err
182: 			}
183: 			outputOpts = append(outputOpts, handlers.WithAuthorizedCollectionActions(collectionActions))
184: 		}
185: 
186: 		item, err := toProto(item, outputOpts...)
187: 		if err != nil {
188: 			return nil, err
189: 		}
190: 
191: 		filterable, err := subtypes.Filterable(item)
192: 		if err != nil {
193: 			return nil, err
194: 		}
195: 		if filter.Match(filterable) {
196: 			finalItems = append(finalItems, item)
197: 		}
198: 	}
199: 	return &pbs.ListCredentialStoresResponse{Items: finalItems}, nil
200: }

448: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)

461: func (s Service) updateInRepo(ctx context.Context, projId, id string, mask []string, item *pb.CredentialStore) (credential.Store, error) {
462: 	const op = "credentialstores.(Service).updateInRepo"
463: 
464: 	var out credential.Store
465: 	var rowsUpdated int
466: 
467: 	dbMask := maskManager.Translate(mask)
468: 	if len(dbMask) == 0 {
469: 		return nil, handlers.InvalidArgumentErrorf("No valid fields included in the update mask.", map[string]string{"update_mask": "No valid fields provided in the update mask."})
470: 	}
471: 
472: 	switch subtypes.SubtypeFromId(domain, id) {
473: 	case vault.Subtype:
474: 		cs, err := toStorageVaultStore(projId, item)
475: 		if err != nil {
476: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
477: 		}
478: 		cs.PublicId = id
479: 
480: 		repo, err := s.vaultRepoFn()
481: 		if err != nil {
482: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
483: 		}
484: 		out, rowsUpdated, err = repo.UpdateCredentialStore(ctx, cs, item.GetVersion(), dbMask)
485: 		if err != nil {
486: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to update credential store"))
487: 		}
488: 
489: 	case static.Subtype:
490: 		cs, err := toStorageStaticStore(projId, item)
491: 		if err != nil {
492: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
493: 		}
494: 		cs.PublicId = id
495: 
496: 		repo, err := s.staticRepoFn()
497: 		if err != nil {
498: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
499: 		}
500: 		out, rowsUpdated, err = repo.UpdateCredentialStore(ctx, cs, item.GetVersion(), dbMask)
501: 		if err != nil {
502: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to update credential store"))
503: 		}
504: 	}
505: 	if rowsUpdated == 0 {
506: 		return nil, handlers.NotFoundErrorf("Credential Store %q doesn't exist or incorrect version provided.", id)
507: 	}
508: 	return out, nil
509: }

541: 	}

545: func (s Service) authResult(ctx context.Context, id string, a action.Type) auth.VerifyResults {
546: 	res := auth.VerifyResults{}
547: 	iamRepo, err := s.iamRepoFn()
548: 	if err != nil {
549: 		res.Error = err
550: 		return res
551: 	}
552: 	vaultRepo, err := s.vaultRepoFn()
553: 	if err != nil {
554: 		res.Error = err
555: 		return res
556: 	}
557: 	staticRepo, err := s.staticRepoFn()
558: 	if err != nil {
559: 		res.Error = err
560: 		return res
561: 	}
562: 
563: 	var parentId string
564: 	opts := []auth.Option{auth.WithType(resource.CredentialStore), auth.WithAction(a)}
565: 	switch a {
566: 	case action.List, action.Create:
567: 		parentId = id

12: // certificate and client certificate key and parses them into pem blocks.
13: // Any non certificate pem blocks are treated as a private key. An error is
14: // returned if there is more than 1 private key provided across both fields.
15: func extractClientCertAndPk(cert, pk string) ([]*pem.Block, *pem.Block, error) {
16: 	const op = "credentialstores.extractClientCertAndPk"
17: 	pks, err := decodePemBlocks(pk)
18: 	if err != nil {
19: 		return nil, nil, errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op, errors.WithMsg("failed to parse client certificate private key"))
20: 	}
21: 	var pkPem *pem.Block
22: 	switch len(pks) {
23: 	case 0:
24: 	case 1:
25: 		pkPem = pks[0]
26: 	default:
27: 		return nil, nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, "private key payload contained multiple pem blocks")
28: 	}
29: 
30: 	bs, err := decodePemBlocks(cert)
31: 	if err != nil {
32: 		return nil, nil, errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op, errors.WithMsg("failed to parse client certificate into pem blocks"))
33: 	}
34: 	pkIdx := -1
35: 	for i, b := range bs {
36: 		if !strings.Contains(b.Type, "CERTIFICATE") {
37: 			switch {
38: 			case pkPem == nil:
39: 				pkIdx, pkPem = i, b
40: 			case pkIdx < 0:
41: 				return nil, nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, "client certificate contains a private key when one was also provided separately")
42: 			default:
43: 				return nil, nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, fmt.Sprintf("second primary key found at %d after previous one found at %d", i, pkIdx))
44: 			}
45: 		}
46: 	}
47: 	if pkIdx >= 0 {
48: 		bs = append(bs[:pkIdx], bs[pkIdx+1:]...)
49: 	}
50: 	return bs, pkPem, nil
51: }

53: func decodePemBlocks(input string) ([]*pem.Block, error) {
54: 	const op = "credentialstores.decodePemBlocks"
55: 	cpIn := make([]byte, len(input))
56: 	copy(cpIn, input)
57: 	var p *pem.Block
58: 	var ret []*pem.Block
59: 	for {
60: 		p, cpIn = pem.Decode(cpIn)

63: 		}
64: 		ret = append(ret, p)
65: 	}

67: 		return nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, "not all data parseable by pem block")
68: 	}

19: // CreateCredentialStore inserts cs into the repository and returns a new
20: // CredentialStore containing the credential store's PublicId. cs is not
21: // changed. cs must not contain a PublicId. The PublicId is generated and
22: // assigned by this method. cs must contain a valid ProjectId, VaultAddress,
23: // and Vault token. The Vault token must be renewable, periodic, and
24: // orphan. CreateCredentialStore calls the /auth/token/renew-self and
25: // /auth/token/lookup-self Vault endpoints.
26: //
27: // Both cs.Name and cs.Description are optional. If cs.Name is set, it must
28: // be unique within cs.ProjectId. Both cs.CreateTime and cs.UpdateTime are
29: // ignored.
30: //
31: // For more information about the required properties of the Vault token see:
32: // https://www.vaultproject.io/api-docs/auth/token#period,
33: // https://www.vaultproject.io/api-docs/auth/token#renewable,
34: // https://www.vaultproject.io/docs/concepts/tokens#token-hierarchies-and-orphan-tokens,
35: // https://www.vaultproject.io/docs/concepts/tokens#periodic-tokens, and
36: // https://www.vaultproject.io/docs/concepts/tokens#token-time-to-live-periodic-tokens-and-explicit-max-ttls.
37: //
38: // For more information about the Vault endpoints called by
39: // CreateCredentialStore see:
40: // https://www.vaultproject.io/api-docs/auth/token#renew-a-token-self and
41: // https://www.vaultproject.io/api-docs/auth/token#lookup-a-token-self.
42: func (r *Repository) CreateCredentialStore(ctx context.Context, cs *CredentialStore, _ ...Option) (*CredentialStore, error) {
43: 	const op = "vault.(Repository).CreateCredentialStore"
44: 	if cs == nil {
45: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "nil CredentialStore")
46: 	}
47: 	if cs.CredentialStore == nil {
48: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "nil embedded CredentialStore")
49: 	}
50: 	if cs.ProjectId == "" {
51: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no project id")
52: 	}
53: 	if len(cs.inputToken) == 0 {
54: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no vault token")
55: 	}
56: 	if cs.VaultAddress == "" {
57: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no vault address")
58: 	}
59: 	if cs.PublicId != "" {
60: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "public id not empty")
61: 	}
62: 	if cs.clientCert != nil && len(cs.clientCert.CertificateKey) == 0 {
63: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "client certificate without private key")
64: 	}
65: 
66: 	cs = cs.clone()
67: 
68: 	id, err := newCredentialStoreId()
69: 	if err != nil {
70: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
71: 	}
72: 	cs.PublicId = id
73: 	if cs.clientCert != nil {
74: 		cs.clientCert.StoreId = id
75: 	}
76: 
77: 	client, err := cs.client()
78: 	if err != nil {
79: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to create vault client"))
80: 	}
81: 	tokenLookup, err := client.lookupToken()
82: 	if err != nil {
83: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to lookup vault token"))
84: 	}
85: 	if err := validateTokenLookup(op, tokenLookup); err != nil {
86: 		return nil, err
87: 	}
88: 
89: 	available, err := client.capabilities(requiredCapabilities.paths())
90: 	if err != nil {
91: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get vault capabilities"))
92: 	}
93: 	missing := available.missing(requiredCapabilities)
94: 	if len(missing) > 0 {
95: 		return nil,
96: 			errors.New(ctx, errors.VaultTokenMissingCapabilities, op, fmt.Sprintf("missing capabilites: %v", missing))
97: 	}
98: 
99: 	renewedToken, err := client.renewToken()
100: 	if err != nil {
101: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to renew vault token"))
102: 	}
103: 
104: 	tokenExpires, err := renewedToken.TokenTTL()
105: 	if err != nil {
106: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get vault token expiration"))
107: 	}
108: 
109: 	accessor, err := renewedToken.TokenAccessor()
110: 	if err != nil {
111: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get vault token accessor"))
112: 	}
113: 
114: 	token, err := newToken(id, cs.inputToken, []byte(accessor), tokenExpires)
115: 	if err != nil {
116: 		return nil, err
117: 	}
118: 
119: 	oplogWrapper, err := r.kms.GetWrapper(ctx, cs.ProjectId, kms.KeyPurposeOplog)
120: 	if err != nil {
121: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get oplog wrapper"))
122: 	}
123: 	databaseWrapper, err := r.kms.GetWrapper(ctx, cs.ProjectId, kms.KeyPurposeDatabase)
124: 	if err != nil {
125: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get database wrapper"))
126: 	}
127: 
128: 	// encrypt
129: 	if err := token.encrypt(ctx, databaseWrapper); err != nil {
130: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
131: 	}
132: 	if cs.clientCert != nil {
133: 		if err := cs.clientCert.encrypt(ctx, databaseWrapper); err != nil {
134: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
135: 		}
136: 	}
137: 
138: 	var newToken *Token
139: 	var newClientCertificate *ClientCertificate
140: 	var newCredentialStore *CredentialStore
141: 	_, err = r.writer.DoTx(ctx, db.StdRetryCnt, db.ExpBackoff{},
142: 		func(_ db.Reader, w db.Writer) error {
143: 			msgs := make([]*oplog.Message, 0, 3)
144: 			ticket, err := w.GetTicket(ctx, cs)
145: 			if err != nil {
146: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get ticket"))
147: 			}
148: 
149: 			// insert credential store
150: 			newCredentialStore = cs.clone()
151: 			var csOplogMsg oplog.Message
152: 			if err := w.Create(ctx, newCredentialStore, db.NewOplogMsg(&csOplogMsg)); err != nil {
153: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
154: 			}
155: 			msgs = append(msgs, &csOplogMsg)
156: 
157: 			// insert token
158: 			newToken = token.clone()
159: 			query, values := newToken.insertQuery()
160: 			rows, err := w.Exec(ctx, query, values)
161: 			if err != nil {
162: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
163: 			}
164: 			if rows > 1 {
165: 				return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, "more than 1 token would have been created")
166: 			}
167: 			msgs = append(msgs, newToken.oplogMessage(db.CreateOp))
168: 
169: 			newCredentialStore.inputToken = nil
170: 			newToken.Token.Token = nil
171: 			newToken.Token.CtToken = nil
172: 			newCredentialStore.outputToken = newToken
173: 
174: 			// insert client certificate (if exists)
175: 			if cs.clientCert != nil {
176: 				newClientCertificate = cs.clientCert.clone()
177: 				var clientCertOplogMsg oplog.Message
178: 				if err := w.Create(ctx, newClientCertificate, db.NewOplogMsg(&clientCertOplogMsg)); err != nil {
179: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
180: 				}
181: 				msgs = append(msgs, &clientCertOplogMsg)
182: 
183: 				newClientCertificate.CertificateKey = nil
184: 				newClientCertificate.CtCertificateKey = nil
185: 				newCredentialStore.clientCert = newClientCertificate
186: 
187: 			}
188: 			metadata := cs.oplog(oplog.OpType_OP_TYPE_CREATE)
189: 			if err := w.WriteOplogEntryWith(ctx, oplogWrapper, ticket, metadata, msgs); err != nil {
190: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to write oplog"))
191: 			}
192: 			return nil
193: 		},
194: 	)
195: 
196: 	if err != nil {
197: 		if errors.IsUniqueError(err) {
198: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("in project: %s: name %s already exists", cs.ProjectId, cs.Name)))
199: 		}
200: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("in project: %s", cs.ProjectId)))
201: 	}
202: 
203: 	// Best effort update next run time of token renewal job, but an error should not
204: 	// cause update to fail.
205: 	// TODO (lcr 05/2021): log error once repo has logger
206: 	_ = r.scheduler.UpdateJobNextRunInAtLeast(ctx, tokenRenewalJobName, token.renewalIn())
207: 
208: 	return newCredentialStore, nil
209: }

211: func validateTokenLookup(op errors.Op, s *vault.Secret) error {
212: 	if s.Data == nil {
213: 		return errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, "vault secret is not a token lookup")
214: 	}
215: 
216: 	if s.Data["renewable"] == nil {
217: 		return errors.EDeprecated(errors.WithCode(errors.VaultTokenNotRenewable), errors.WithOp(op))
218: 	}
219: 	renewable, err := parseutil.ParseBool(s.Data["renewable"])
220: 	if err != nil {
221: 		return errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op)
222: 	}
223: 	if !renewable {
224: 		return errors.EDeprecated(errors.WithCode(errors.VaultTokenNotRenewable), errors.WithOp(op))
225: 	}
226: 
227: 	if s.Data["orphan"] == nil {
228: 		return errors.EDeprecated(errors.WithCode(errors.VaultTokenNotOrphan), errors.WithOp(op))
229: 	}
230: 	orphan, err := parseutil.ParseBool(s.Data["orphan"])
231: 	if err != nil {
232: 		return errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op)
233: 	}
234: 	if !orphan {
235: 		return errors.EDeprecated(errors.WithCode(errors.VaultTokenNotOrphan), errors.WithOp(op))
236: 	}
237: 
238: 	if s.Data["period"] == nil {
239: 		return errors.EDeprecated(errors.WithCode(errors.VaultTokenNotPeriodic), errors.WithOp(op))
240: 	}
241: 
242: 	return nil
243: }

245: // LookupCredentialStore returns the CredentialStore for publicId. Returns
246: // nil, nil if no CredentialStore is found for publicId.
247: func (r *Repository) LookupCredentialStore(ctx context.Context, publicId string, _ ...Option) (*CredentialStore, error) {
248: 	const op = "vault.(Repository).LookupCredentialStore"
249: 	if publicId == "" {
250: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no public id")
251: 	}
252: 	agg := allocPublicStore()
253: 	agg.PublicId = publicId
254: 	if err := r.reader.LookupByPublicId(ctx, agg); err != nil {
255: 		if errors.IsNotFoundError(err) {
256: 			return nil, nil
257: 		}
258: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("failed for: %s", publicId)))
259: 	}
260: 	return agg.toCredentialStore(), nil
261: }

331: // UpdateCredentialStore updates the repository entry for cs.PublicId with
332: // the values in cs for the fields listed in fieldMaskPaths. It returns a
333: // new CredentialStore containing the updated values and a count of the
334: // number of records updated. cs is not changed.
335: //
336: // cs must contain a valid PublicId. Only Name, Description, Namespace,
337: // TlsServerName, TlsSkipVerify, CaCert, VaultAddress, ClientCertificate,
338: // ClientCertificateKey, workerFilter, and Token can be changed. If cs.Name is set to a
339: // non-empty string, it must be unique within cs.Projectid. If Token is changed,
340: // the new token must have the same properties defined in CreateCredentialStore
341: // and UpdateCredentialStore calls the same Vault endpoints described in
342: // CreateCredentialStore.
343: //
344: // An attribute of cs will be set to NULL in the database if the attribute
345: // in cs is the zero value and it is included in fieldMaskPaths.
346: func (r *Repository) UpdateCredentialStore(ctx context.Context, cs *CredentialStore, version uint32, fieldMaskPaths []string, _ ...Option) (*CredentialStore, int, error) {
347: 	const op = "vault.(Repository).UpdateCredentialStore"
348: 	if cs == nil {
349: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "missing CredentialStore")
350: 	}
351: 	if cs.CredentialStore == nil {
352: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "missing embedded CredentialStore")
353: 	}
354: 	if cs.PublicId == "" {
355: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidPublicId, op, "missing public id")
356: 	}
357: 	if version == 0 {
358: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "missing version")
359: 	}
360: 	if cs.ProjectId == "" {
361: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "missing project id")
362: 	}
363: 	cs = cs.clone()
364: 
365: 	var validateToken, updateToken bool
366: 	for _, f := range fieldMaskPaths {
367: 		switch {
368: 		case strings.EqualFold(nameField, f):
369: 		case strings.EqualFold(descriptionField, f):
370: 		case strings.EqualFold(namespaceField, f):
371: 		case strings.EqualFold(tlsServerNameField, f):
372: 		case strings.EqualFold(tlsSkipVerifyField, f):
373: 		case strings.EqualFold(workerFilterField, f):
374: 		case strings.EqualFold(caCertField, f):
375: 		case strings.EqualFold(vaultAddressField, f):
376: 			validateToken = true
377: 		case strings.EqualFold(certificateField, f):
378: 		case strings.EqualFold(certificateKeyField, f):
379: 		case strings.EqualFold(tokenField, f):
380: 			if len(cs.inputToken) != 0 {
381: 				updateToken = true
382: 				validateToken = true
383: 			}
384: 		default:
385: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidFieldMask, op, f)
386: 		}
387: 	}
388: 	dbMask, nullFields := dbw.BuildUpdatePaths(
389: 		map[string]interface{}{
390: 			nameField:          cs.Name,
391: 			descriptionField:   cs.Description,
392: 			namespaceField:     cs.Namespace,
393: 			tlsServerNameField: cs.TlsServerName,
394: 			tlsSkipVerifyField: cs.TlsSkipVerify,
395: 			workerFilterField:  cs.WorkerFilter,
396: 			caCertField:        cs.CaCert,
397: 			vaultAddressField:  cs.VaultAddress,
398: 			tokenField:         cs.inputToken,
399: 		},
400: 		fieldMaskPaths,
401: 		[]string{
402: 			tlsSkipVerifyField,
403: 		},
404: 	)
405: 	var clientCert, clientCertKey []byte
406: 	if cs.ClientCertificate() != nil {
407: 		clientCert = cs.ClientCertificate().GetCertificate()
408: 		clientCertKey = cs.ClientCertificate().GetCertificateKey()
409: 	}
410: 	certDbMask, certNullFields := dbw.BuildUpdatePaths(
411: 		map[string]interface{}{
412: 			certificateField:    clientCert,
413: 			certificateKeyField: clientCertKey,
414: 		},
415: 		fieldMaskPaths, nil,
416: 	)
417: 	if len(certNullFields) != 0 && len(certNullFields) != 2 {
418: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "attempting to unset a required field on a client cert")
419: 	}
420: 	if len(append(dbMask, certDbMask...)) == 0 && len(append(nullFields, certNullFields...)) == 0 {
421: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.EmptyFieldMask, op, "missing field mask")
422: 	}
423: 
424: 	var filteredDbMask, filteredNullFields []string
425: 	for _, f := range dbMask {
426: 		switch {
427: 		case strings.EqualFold(tokenField, f):
428: 		default:
429: 			filteredDbMask = append(filteredDbMask, f)
430: 		}
431: 	}
432: 	for _, f := range nullFields {
433: 		switch {
434: 		case strings.EqualFold(tokenField, f):
435: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "attempting to unset the value for token")
436: 		default:
437: 			filteredNullFields = append(filteredNullFields, f)
438: 		}
439: 	}
440: 
441: 	oplogWrapper, err := r.kms.GetWrapper(ctx, cs.ProjectId, kms.KeyPurposeOplog)
442: 	if err != nil {
443: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected,
444: 			errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get oplog wrapper"))
445: 	}
446: 	databaseWrapper, err := r.kms.GetWrapper(ctx, cs.ProjectId, kms.KeyPurposeDatabase)
447: 	if err != nil {
448: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected,
449: 			errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get database wrapper"))
450: 	}
451: 
452: 	ps, err := r.lookupPrivateStore(ctx, cs.GetPublicId())
453: 	if err != nil {
454: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to lookup private credential store"))
455: 	}
456: 	if ps == nil {
457: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.RecordNotFound, op, fmt.Sprintf("credential store %s", cs.PublicId))
458: 	}
459: 	origStore := ps.toCredentialStore()
460: 	origStore.inputToken = ps.Token
461: 	if len(ps.ClientCert) > 0 {
462: 		origStore.clientCert, err = NewClientCertificate(ps.ClientCert, ps.ClientKey)
463: 	}
464: 	if err != nil {
465: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("can't recreate client certificate for vault client creation"))
466: 	}
467: 	updatedStore := origStore.applyUpdate(cs, fieldMaskPaths)
468: 
469: 	if len(certDbMask) > 0 && updatedStore.clientCert != nil {
470: 		if err := updatedStore.clientCert.encrypt(ctx, databaseWrapper); err != nil {
471: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
472: 		}
473: 	}
474: 
475: 	var token *Token
476: 	client, err := updatedStore.client()
477: 	if err != nil {
478: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get client for updated store"))
479: 	}
480: 	if validateToken {
481: 		tokenLookup, err := client.lookupToken()
482: 		if err != nil {
483: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("cannot lookup token for updated store"))
484: 		}
485: 		if err := validateTokenLookup(op, tokenLookup); err != nil {
486: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
487: 		}
488: 
489: 		available, err := client.capabilities(requiredCapabilities.paths())
490: 		if err != nil {
491: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get vault capabilities"))
492: 		}
493: 		missing := available.missing(requiredCapabilities)
494: 		if len(missing) > 0 {
495: 			return nil,
496: 				db.NoRowsAffected,
497: 				errors.New(ctx, errors.VaultTokenMissingCapabilities, op, fmt.Sprintf("missing capabilites: %v", missing))
498: 		}
499: 	}
500: 	if updateToken {
501: 		renewedToken, err := client.renewToken()
502: 		if err != nil {
503: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to renew vault token"))
504: 		}
505: 		tokenExpires, err := renewedToken.TokenTTL()
506: 		if err != nil {
507: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get vault token expiration"))
508: 		}
509: 		accessor, err := renewedToken.TokenAccessor()
510: 		if err != nil {
511: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get vault token accessor"))
512: 		}
513: 		if token, err = newToken(cs.GetPublicId(), cs.inputToken, []byte(accessor), tokenExpires); err != nil {
514: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
515: 		}
516: 		// encrypt token
517: 		if err := token.encrypt(ctx, databaseWrapper); err != nil {
518: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
519: 		}
520: 	}
521: 
522: 	var rowsUpdated int
523: 	var returnedCredentialStore *CredentialStore
524: 	_, err = r.writer.DoTx(ctx, db.StdRetryCnt, db.ExpBackoff{},
525: 		func(reader db.Reader, w db.Writer) error {
526: 			msgs := make([]*oplog.Message, 0, 3)
527: 			ticket, err := w.GetTicket(ctx, cs)
528: 			if err != nil {
529: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get ticket"))
530: 			}
531: 
532: 			cs := cs.clone()
533: 			var csOplogMsg oplog.Message
534: 
535: 			switch {
536: 			case len(filteredDbMask) == 0 && len(filteredNullFields) == 0:
537: 				// the credential store's fields are not being updated,
538: 				// just it's token or client certificate, so we need to
539: 				// just update the credential store's version.
540: 				cs.Version = version + 1
541: 				rowsUpdated, err = w.Update(ctx, cs, []string{"Version"}, nil, db.NewOplogMsg(&csOplogMsg), db.WithVersion(&version))
542: 				if err != nil {
543: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to update credential store version"))
544: 				}
545: 				switch rowsUpdated {
546: 				case 1:
547: 				case 0:
548: 					return nil
549: 				default:
550: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, fmt.Sprintf("updated credential store version and %d rows updated", rowsUpdated))
551: 				}
552: 			default:
553: 				rowsUpdated, err = w.Update(ctx, cs, filteredDbMask, filteredNullFields, db.NewOplogMsg(&csOplogMsg), db.WithVersion(&version))
554: 				if err != nil {
555: 					if errors.IsUniqueError(err) {
556: 						return errors.New(ctx, errors.NotUnique, op,
557: 							fmt.Sprintf("name %s already exists: %s", cs.Name, cs.PublicId))
558: 					}
559: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to update credential store"))
560: 				}
561: 				switch rowsUpdated {
562: 				case 1:
563: 				case 0:
564: 					return nil
565: 				default:
566: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, fmt.Sprintf("updated credential store and %d rows updated", rowsUpdated))
567: 				}
568: 			}
569: 			msgs = append(msgs, &csOplogMsg)
570: 
571: 			switch {
572: 			case len(certNullFields) == 2:
573: 				// Delete the certificate
574: 				deleteCert := allocClientCertificate()
575: 				deleteCert.StoreId = cs.GetPublicId()
576: 				query, values := deleteCert.deleteQuery()
577: 				rows, err := w.Exec(ctx, query, values)
578: 				if err != nil {
579: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to delete client certificate"))
580: 				}
581: 				if rows > 1 {
582: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, "more than 1 client certificate would have been deleted")
583: 				}
584: 				msgs = append(msgs, deleteCert.oplogMessage(db.DeleteOp))
585: 			case len(certDbMask) > 0:
586: 				if updatedStore.clientCert == nil {
587: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "updated cert")
588: 				}
589: 				query, values := updatedStore.clientCert.insertQuery()
590: 				rows, err := w.Exec(ctx, query, values)
591: 				if err != nil {
592: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to upsert client certificate"))
593: 				}
594: 				if rows > 1 {
595: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, "more than 1 client certificate would have been upserted")
596: 				}
597: 			}
598: 
599: 			if updateToken {
600: 				query, values := token.insertQuery()
601: 				rows, err := w.Exec(ctx, query, values)
602: 				if err != nil {
603: 					if errors.IsUniqueError(err) {
604: 						return errors.New(ctx, errors.NotUnique, op,
605: 							fmt.Sprintf("token already exists"))
606: 					}
607: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
608: 				}
609: 				if rows > 1 {
610: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, "more than 1 token would have been created")
611: 				}
612: 				msgs = append(msgs, token.oplogMessage(db.CreateOp))
613: 			}
614: 
615: 			publicId := cs.PublicId
616: 			agg := allocPublicStore()
617: 			agg.PublicId = publicId
618: 			if err := reader.LookupByPublicId(ctx, agg); err != nil {
619: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("unable to lookup credential store: %s", publicId)))
620: 			}
621: 			returnedCredentialStore = agg.toCredentialStore()
622: 
623: 			metadata := cs.oplog(oplog.OpType_OP_TYPE_UPDATE)
624: 			if err := w.WriteOplogEntryWith(ctx, oplogWrapper, ticket, metadata, msgs); err != nil {
625: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to write oplog"))
626: 			}
627: 			return nil
628: 		},
629: 	)
630: 
631: 	if err != nil {
632: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, err
633: 	}
634: 
635: 	if updateToken && token != nil {
636: 		// Best effort update next run time of token renewal job, but an error should not
637: 		// cause update to fail.
638: 		// TODO (lcr 05/2021): log error once repo has logger
639: 		_ = r.scheduler.UpdateJobNextRunInAtLeast(ctx, tokenRenewalJobName, token.renewalIn())
640: 	}
641: 
642: 	return returnedCredentialStore, rowsUpdated, nil
643: }

645: // ListCredentialStores returns a slice of CredentialStores for the
646: // projectIds. WithLimit is the only option supported.
647: func (r *Repository) ListCredentialStores(ctx context.Context, projectIds []string, opt ...Option) ([]*CredentialStore, error) {
648: 	const op = "vault.(Repository).ListCredentialStores"
649: 	if len(projectIds) == 0 {
650: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no projectIds")
651: 	}
652: 	opts := getOpts(opt...)
653: 	limit := r.defaultLimit
654: 	if opts.withLimit != 0 {
655: 		// non-zero signals an override of the default limit for the repo.
656: 		limit = opts.withLimit
657: 	}
658: 	var credentialStores []*publicStore
659: 	err := r.reader.SearchWhere(ctx, &credentialStores, "project_id in (?)", []interface{}{projectIds}, db.WithLimit(limit))
660: 	if err != nil {
661: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
662: 	}
663: 	var out []*CredentialStore
664: 	for _, ca := range credentialStores {
665: 		out = append(out, ca.toCredentialStore())
666: 	}
667: 	return out, nil
668: }

671: // the number of records deleted. All options are ignored.
672: func (r *Repository) DeleteCredentialStore(ctx context.Context, publicId string, _ ...Option) (int, error) {
673: 	const op = "vault.(Repository).DeleteCredentialStore"
674: 	if publicId == "" {
675: 		return db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no public id")
676: 	}
677: 
678: 	cs := allocCredentialStore()
679: 	cs.PublicId = publicId
680: 	if err := r.reader.LookupByPublicId(ctx, cs); err != nil {
681: 		if errors.IsNotFoundError(err) {
682: 			return db.NoRowsAffected, nil
683: 		}
684: 		return db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("failed for %s", publicId)))
685: 	}
686: 	if cs.ProjectId == "" {
687: 		return db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no project id")
688: 	}
689: 
690: 	oplogWrapper, err := r.kms.GetWrapper(ctx, cs.ProjectId, kms.KeyPurposeOplog)
691: 	if err != nil {
692: 		return db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get oplog wrapper"))
693: 	}
694: 
695: 	var rows int
696: 	query, values := cs.softDeleteQuery()
697: 	_, err = r.writer.DoTx(
698: 		ctx, db.StdRetryCnt, db.ExpBackoff{},
699: 		func(_ db.Reader, w db.Writer) (err error) {
700: 			var msgs []*oplog.Message
701: 			ticket, err := w.GetTicket(ctx, cs)
702: 			if err != nil {
703: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get ticket"))
704: 			}
705: 
706: 			rows, err = w.Exec(ctx, query, values)
707: 			if err != nil {
708: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
709: 			}
710: 			if rows > 1 {
711: 				return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, "more than 1 credential store would have been deleted")
712: 			}
713: 			msg := cs.oplogMessage(db.UpdateOp)
714: 			msg.FieldMaskPaths = []string{"DeleteTime"}
715: 			msgs = append(msgs, msg)
716: 
717: 			metadata := cs.oplog(oplog.OpType_OP_TYPE_UPDATE)
718: 			if err := w.WriteOplogEntryWith(ctx, oplogWrapper, ticket, metadata, msgs); err != nil {
719: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to write oplog"))
720: 			}
721: 
722: 			return nil
723: 		},
724: 	)
725: 
726: 	if err != nil {
727: 		return db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("delete failed for %s", cs.PublicId)))
728: 	}
729: 
730: 	if rows > 0 {
731: 		// Schedule token revocation and credential store cleanup jobs to run immediately
732: 		_ = r.scheduler.UpdateJobNextRunInAtLeast(ctx, tokenRevocationJobName, 0, scheduler.WithRunNow(true))
733: 		_ = r.scheduler.UpdateJobNextRunInAtLeast(ctx, credentialStoreCleanupJobName, 0, scheduler.WithRunNow(true))
